══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Simic Hybrid — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

REASONING: Multiattack on Simic Hybrid — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 25 damage. Simic Hybrid — Unarmored Caster HP: 42/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Simic Hybrid — Unarmored Caster HP: 24/67
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Simic Hybrid — Unarmored Caster HP: 9/67
══ ROUND 2 ══

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Simic Hybrid — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 17/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
